title: Figure 2 from: Karimi O, Afshari N, Asghari R, Li Q, Chethana KWT, Hyde KD, Alotibi FO (2024) Novel discoveries of Xylariomycetidae (Ascomycota) taxa from peat swamp forests and other terrestrial habitats in Thailand. MycoKeys 107: 219-247. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.107.127749
author: Karimi, Omid
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2 Xylaria bawanglingensis (MFLU 24-0018, new host and geographical record) a stromata on host b, c stromata d longitudinal section through the stroma e–h asci i paraphyses j apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent k, l ascospores m upper view and reverse view of the one-week-old colony on PDA. Scale bars: 1 mm (b, d); 20 µm (e–g); 70 µm (h); 20 µm (i); 5 µm (j); 10 µm (k, l).
